variants.title: Fleetguard HF35453 Hydraulic Filters | Replaces the Donaldson P170089
variants.description: Fleetguard® HF35453 premium hydraulic spin-on filter with cellulose media is designed to help keep your precision hydraulic systems running as intended, providing a solution for various applications.  This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.

variants.title: Donaldson P170089 Hydraulic Spin-On, Duramax
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P170089 Hydraulic Spin-On, Duramax is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
